name: @aily-project/board-raspberrypi_pico2
description: The Raspberry Pi Pico 2 is based on the RP2350 chip with dual-core Arm Cortex-M33 or RISC-V Hazard3 processors at up to 150 MHz, 520 KB SRAM, 4 MB onboard Flash, 26 multi-function GPIO pins, SPI, I2C, UART, ADC, PWM, and enhanced security features over its predecessor.
author: RaspberryPi
